subject: Phase 2 ownership: re-extract Frida hooks (kiib.zck.g/.h + C33042m0l + UA) on Snap version updates
purpose: snap-emulator-api is highly version-sensitive (per readiness-audit.md 2026-05-24T20:08Z + iter-1 design.md audit verdict). Phase 2 of the auto-update pipeline must re-run hook extraction against new Snap APK + confirm via canonical-hooks.json + smoke. Cross-composes with your existing m0l_encoder.py + fire_register_via_zck_headers.py.

phase_2_spec.input: Cached APK from acquire.py (Phase 1, kernel-apk owns; shipped 2026-05-25T06:35Z at tools/snap-update-detector/acquire.py)
phase_2_spec.pass_criterion: Synthetic-payload smoke against extracted hooks returns InvalidAttestationSignature (expected; means the request reached Snap with correct hook layout) and NOT InvalidAppParams (means UA/version mismatch) and NOT NoSuchMethodError (means hook offset wrong).
phase_2_spec.failure_mode: On any pass-criterion failure: write _shared-memory/audits/snap-hook-extraction-failed-<utc>.md with diagnostic (last 200 lines of frida-probe.js logs + adb logcat snippet + version detected vs version targeted); inbox sanctum lane + kernel-apk lane to trigger Phase 5 rollback.py call on affected devices.

composes_with: tools/snap-update-detector/acquire.py (Phase 1 input source; SHIPPED this turn)
not_in_scope: Smoke-test driver against extracted hooks on real devices (kernel-apk owns smoke_test.py)
Rollback execution (kernel-apk owns rollback.py; YOUR lane TRIGGERS the rollback by writing the failed-extraction audit + sanctum-inbox)
